items.name_cn:
L⊚℮w℮🌟 🔥 New Version 🆕 New Small Classic Calfskin Puzzle Waist Bag 🌟
*The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create the Puzzle's unique geometric lines. This small waist bag is made of classic calfskin, featuring overlapping edges. size:24*16*10.5

items.name_en: L⊚℮w℮🌟 Nylon Puffer Goya Bag 🆕 New Arrival 👏
items.name_cn:
L⊚℮w℮🌟 Nylon Puffer Goya Bag 🆕 New Arrival 👏
Inspired by Goya aesthetics and key details, bringing a new sensory and tactile dimension with padded goose down. This version is made of nylon, featuring a removable and adjustable lo*ewe jacquard shoulder strap* shoulder carry* magnetic closure* four interior pockets, including a zip pocket and a snap pocket* contrasting leather lining 🆕
size:23*9*17CM
Model:062768

items.name_en: Loewe🌟New Arrival Shiny Nappa Leather Paseo Bag, exquisite craftsmanship🆕Simple silhouette, elegant. Unique, soft pleated structure brings softness and ultra-light construction. This handbag is made of shiny Nappa leather. The top short handle is decorated with a Flamenco spiral knot. Crossbody or shoulder bag, detachable and adjustable shoulder strap* magnetic closure* one internal slip pocket* gold suede lining* Loewe hot stamping.

items.name_en: Small size 👄L Classic hammock bag, free-folding zipper design, can also hold a MacBook and A4 notebook. Two small pockets on the sides, perfect for a Plus phone and important cards. If you feel it's not big enough, unzip it for massive storage! With this bag, work and travel are worry-free... Versatile styles, easy to match with any outfit, even casual wear is effortless. If you go for a ladylike style, wrap a silk scarf around the handle, and the bag becomes soft and you are perfect! A bag with a fairy-like aura, gentle and elegant is its name. Such understated elegance is a favorite for the artsy crowd. Unique style, walk your own path, those who like it should get one! Spanish calfskin, the material and feel are impeccable. Top-tier leather gets softer and more textured the more you wear it! Top-tier custom hardware, lining, imported YKK zipper, ZP craftsmanship, presented beautifully. Bring the Luo family's 'transforming little diamond' to the fashion world! Size: 29*14*26cm
